basics.name: Junyi Lu
basics.label: AI Engineer
basics.summary: I am an AI engineer at China Mobile and a graduate of UESTC. My earlier work spanned diverse fields, including financial engineering and quantum machine learning, while I have recently expanded into emerging directions such as large language models, AI agents, deep learning, and artificial intelligence. I am currently seeking a research assistant position related to large language models or AI agents.

work.summary: Developed an AI-agent system from scratch for the AIoT platform, empowering over 1 billion connected devices with scalable AI capabilities.
highlights: Built scalable AI-agent system for IoT platform serving 1B+ connected devices

work.summary: Contributed to the research of domain-specific LLMs, specifically fine-tuning an Ecological Environment LLM and executing on-premise deployment for a Water Resources LLM.

education.institution: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China

awards.title: Alibaba Cloud Certified Professional (ACP) – Large Language Model Specialist

publications.name: SONG, X.; CHEN, W.; LU, J. Research on Financial Stock Market Prediction Based on the Hidden Quantum Markov Model
publications.summary: This paper proposes a hidden quantum Markov model for financial stock market prediction.

publications.name: LU, J.; HU, Y.; LI, X. et al. A New Stock Forecasting Model by Hidden Quantum Markov Models
publications.summary: A new stock forecasting model based on hidden quantum Markov models presented at ICAIS 2022.

publications.name: CHEN, S.; LU, J.; TENG, B. Study on the influence of scale on the phase transition properties of nanoisland
publications.publisher: Physica A: Statistical Mechanics and its Applications, 593, 127004 (JCR Q2)
publications.summary: Study on how scale influences phase transition properties of nanoislands.

publications.name: CHEN, S.; WU, Y.; LU, J.; TENG, B. Reentrant phenomenon in the decorated ising model
publications.summary: Investigation of the reentrant phenomenon in the decorated Ising model.

patents.name: Disease Progression Prediction System and Platform Based on Quantum Neural Networks
patents.summary: A system and platform for disease progression prediction using quantum neural networks.

patents.name: Method for Predicting Ligand-Protein Interactions Based on Quantum Computing
patents.summary: A method for predicting ligand-protein interactions leveraging quantum computing.

patents.name: Quantum Open System Simulation Method, Storage Medium and Terminal Based on Different Measurement Approaches
patents.summary: A quantum open system simulation method supporting multiple measurement approaches.

patents.name: Simulation Method for Quantum Conditional Master Equation in Quantum Transport Processes Using Recurrent Neural Networks
patents.summary: A simulation method for quantum conditional master equations using recurrent neural networks.

teaching.description: Graded homework, led seminar discussions, and lectured approximately one-third of the course sessions.
